RT @icreatelife: We just released Turntable in Illustrator for everyone 🎉

You can rotate 2D vector art in 3D.
Place all frames on canvas.…

Claude Code 终端全屏渲染模式

Claude Code 推出了一个新的终端渲染模式，代号 NO_FLICKER。启用方式很简单：CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER=1 claude。

用过 Claude Code 的人大概都有体感：对话一长，终端就开始闪屏、跳屏，VS Code 内置终端和 tmux 里尤其明显。这是终端渲染的先天限制，ANSI

RT @godofprompt: 🚨 How it feels knowing Anthropic is now officially more open than OpenAI https://t.co/vaQTCX8f1U
The only job of a CEO is to sell.

Marc Andreessen says the biggest mistake in venture isn’t losing money. It’s missing the outlier.

"There are two categories of mistakes: there's the mistake of commission and the mistake of omission. Or the mistake of cost and the mistake of opportunity cost."

"The mistake of https://t.co/fzlOqMqHyS

My first game dev job was in 2005 🤯 and this is a screenshot from that game! 

The game was called "Night Watch" racing and here's a screenshot I found from it. It was a fantasy action on trucks based on fantasy books I read as a kid 😭

It was a team of six people, including https://t.co/MxiM0DZYia

The amount of "why is the bag changing" comments 💀 (from game devs, no less)

This is one vector - front view only. No bag reference. 

Illustrator doesn't know what the bag looks like, so it made it up. ~140 times.

Fix? Add a back view + turntable. That's it. Come on, guys!
